source: HubSpot Instance custom object (2-39181518) joined to customer_profiles + orders_verified + churn_risk_matrix. Multi-key join cascade: installer_id → allmoxy_customer_id → stripe_subscription_id → stripe_company_id → installer_url subdomain → normalized name. Filtered to active (non-Cancelled, non-Pre-Sale, non-sandbox) instances.
